name: regular-doubled
comment: Regular {3,4,6,12} side-1 tiles PLUS their side-2 variants, 12-direction (octagon-blind). A side-2 N-gon is modeled as a degenerate 2N-gon with unit edges whose boundary alternates (real corner θ_N = D/2 - D/N, flat 180° corner = D/2); rotational structure comes from L=2N with p=2 (same mechanism as an isotoxal star n*). The flat corner is noncounting, so a (flat,flat) mid-edge abutment of two side-2 tiles is not a k-vertex. Exploratory demo: NO external oracle (not A068599), counts are observations. See docs/DEVELOPMENT_NOTES.md.
